title: hieracium alatum subsp. chrysanthemoides
intro: Hieracium alatum subsp. chrysanthemoides, also known as winged hawkweed, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects due to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Hieracium alatum subsp. chrysanthemoides include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing, as well as its possible use as a natural antimicrobial agent. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to support the immune system and promote overall well-being.
